title: Docs formatting pass: match session-workflow style, banner confetti, nav links, TOC depth

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Pattern from session-workflow: (1) tl;dr in feature-card box at top, (2) nbsp spacers between major sections, (3) --- dividers between major sections, (4) sentence case headings, (5) H2 for major sections, H3 for subsections, (6) arrow → in column spacers. Also: comment out banner confetti, enable page-navigation, toc-depth: 3.
